mapper.select: /* UnpayBondMgmtMapper.getUnpayBondDtlListEx */ SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.STDR_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS STDR_YM_EX , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.USG_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS USG_YM_EX , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS BILL_YM_EX , FN_GET_SALE_ITMNM(A.BILL_ITEM_CD) AS SALE_ITM_NM , SUM(NVL(A.INV_AMNT,0)) AS INV_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.INV_VAT ,0)) AS INV_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_A_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_A_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_A_VAT,0)) AS ADJ_A_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_B_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_B_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_B_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_B_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_C_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_C_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_C_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_C_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_D_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_D_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_D_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_D_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_E_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_E_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_E_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_E_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_F_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_F_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_F_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_F_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_G_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_G_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_G_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_G_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_H_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_H_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_H_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_H_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT,0)) AS ADJ_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_VAT ,0)) AS ADJ_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT,0) + NVL(ADJ_VAT,0)) AS TOT_ADJ_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.INV_AMNT,0) + NVL(A.INV_VAT,0) - (NVL(A.ADJ_AMNT,0) + NVL(A.ADJ_VAT,0))) AS TOT_INV_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.PYM_AMNT,0)) AS PYM_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.PYM_VAT ,0)) AS PYM_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.PYM_AMNT,0) + NVL(A.PYM_VAT,0)) AS TOT_PYM_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.UNPD_AMNT,0)) AS UNPD_AMNT , SUM(NVL(A.UNPD_VAT ,0)) AS UNPD_VAT , SUM(NVL(A.UNPD_AMNT,0) + NVL(A.UNPD_VAT,0)) AS TOT_UNPD_AMNT , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , MAX(A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS CONTRACT_NUM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MIN(A.DUEDAT_DATE), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUEDAT_DATE_EX , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS BLPYM_DATE_EX , FN_GET_CODENM ('CLS0045', MAX(A.PYMN_MTHD_CD)) AS PYMN_MTHD_NM , FN_GET_CODENM ('MSP0003', MIN(B.SUB_STATUS)) AS STATUS_NM , MIN(B.SUB_LINK_NAME) AS SUB_LINK_NAME , FN_GET_ORGNM(DECODE(B.OPEN_AGNT_CD, NULL, '1100011741', 'K000001', '1100011741', 'AA00364', '1100011741', '1100005928', '1100011741', B.OPEN_AGNT_CD)) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM , CASE WHEN MIN(A.DUEDAT_DATE) < MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE) THEN TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(NVL(MAX(A.BLPYM_DATE), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(MIN(A.DUEDAT_DATE), 'YYYYMMDD'))) ELSE 0 END AS UNPD_MNTH_CNT FROM MSP_UNPD_BOND_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.STDR_YM = #{stdrYm} AND A.BILL_YM BETWEEN #{strtYm} AND #{endYm} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) GROUP BY A.STDR_YM, A.USG_YM, A.BILL_YM, A.BILL_ITEM_CD, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, B.OPEN_AGNT_CD ORDER BY A.BILL_YM, A.SVC_CNTR_NO, A.BILL_ITEM_CD
